Prefer `agh__network_send` when available; otherwise use `agh network send` to respond.
For replies to this message, keep `--session "$AGH_SESSION_ID"`, `--channel "builders"`, `--surface "direct"`, `--direct "direct_274bb255d86100d85556825390689d80"`, `--to "patch-worker.sess-1a43a08be3e7c019"`, `--work "work_patch_42"`, and `--reply-to "msg_direct_01"`.
If this inbound message is the direct cause of your reply, set `--causation-id "msg_direct_01"` on the outbound message.
Preserve `--trace-id "trace_ops_patch_42"` on correlated follow-up messages.
Preserve `--work "work_patch_42"` only while continuing the same lifecycle-bearing work.
If you send a protocol `receipt`, the body must include `for_id` and a valid `status`. Use `status:"accepted"` for normal admission. Use `status:"rejected"`, `"duplicate"`, `"expired"`, or `"unsupported"` only with a matching `reason_code`.
If you send a protocol `trace`, the body must include a valid `state` such as `working`, `needs_input`, `completed`, `failed`, or `canceled`.
If you send a protocol `capability`, the body must be nested as `{"capability":{...}}` and include `capability.id`, `capability.summary`, `capability.outcome`, and a canonical `capability.digest`.
Direct-room chat uses `--kind say --surface direct`.
Examples:
```bash
# Reply
agh network send \
  --session "$AGH_SESSION_ID" \
  --channel "builders" \
  --surface "direct" \
  --direct "direct_274bb255d86100d85556825390689d80" \
  --kind say \
  --to "patch-worker.sess-1a43a08be3e7c019" \
  --work "work_patch_42" \
  --reply-to "msg_direct_01" \
  --causation-id "msg_direct_01" \
  --trace-id "trace_ops_patch_42" \
  --body '{"text":"Reply text","intent":"reply"}' \
  -o json

# Protocol receipt
agh network send \
  --session "$AGH_SESSION_ID" \
  --channel "builders" \
  --surface "direct" \
  --direct "direct_274bb255d86100d85556825390689d80" \
  --kind receipt \
  --to "patch-worker.sess-1a43a08be3e7c019" \
  --work "work_patch_42" \
  --reply-to "msg_direct_01" \
  --causation-id "msg_direct_01" \
  --trace-id "trace_ops_patch_42" \
  --body '{"for_id":"msg_direct_01","status":"accepted","detail":"Accepted for processing."}' \
  -o json

# Protocol trace
agh network send \
  --session "$AGH_SESSION_ID" \
  --channel "builders" \
  --surface "direct" \
  --direct "direct_274bb255d86100d85556825390689d80" \
  --kind trace \
  --to "patch-worker.sess-1a43a08be3e7c019" \
  --work "work_patch_42" \
  --reply-to "msg_direct_01" \
  --causation-id "msg_direct_01" \
  --trace-id "trace_ops_patch_42" \
  --body '{"state":"working","message":"Inspecting the request."}' \
  -o json

# Protocol capability
agh network send \
  --session "$AGH_SESSION_ID" \
  --channel "builders" \
  --surface "direct" \
  --direct "direct_274bb255d86100d85556825390689d80" \
```
